mechanism_narrative: A rising 3-month trend in retail sales signals resilient household demand and stronger near-term revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS growth is positive.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by non-positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the federal funds rate raises equity discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days after aggressive policy-rate moves.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes deliver positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the triggered mean return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion accompanied by a stable or falling unemployment rate confirms labor-income growth without immediate recession stress, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-flat-or-down condition has a 20-day hit rate below 50% or a negative average forward return.

mechanism_narrative: Very elevated housing starts during a rate-hiking phase signal rate-sensitive overextension in residential investment, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST > 1900 and FEDFUNDS increases > 0.25pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if drawdowns are not larger than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A positive 6-month trend in industrial production signals broadening real activity and improving operating leverage, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if positive 6-month INDPRO changes have a 60-day forward Rank IC below 0.03 over any rolling 3-year walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices combined with a rising policy rate signals inflation-driven monetary restraint, compressing valuation multiples and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized inflation crosses above 3% and FEDFUNDS 3-month change > 0
failure_condition: Reject if triggered inflation-tightening episodes do not underperform the unconditional 20-day S&P 500 return by at least 25 basis points on average.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate combined with slowing payroll growth signals deterioration in household income and recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises > 0.30pp over 3 months and PAYEMS 3-month growth falls below its prior 12-month average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered labor-deterioration episodes have a positive average 60-day S&P 500 return or a downside hit rate below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A small federal funds rate increase from a low level while unemployment remains contained signals normalization rather than restrictive policy, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS < 3.0 and FEDFUNDS increases > 0.10pp over 1 month while UNRATE <= 5.5
regime_hint: early tightening with contained labor slack
failure_condition: Reject if this low-rate normalization trigger produces negative 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward instances.
